en: Does not wisdom call?Does not understanding raise her voice?
zh: 智慧不是在呼喚， 聰明不是在發聲嗎？

en: On the heights beside the way, at the crossroads she takes her stand;
zh: 它在路旁高處的最高點， 在十字路口站著；

en: beside the gates in front of the town, at the entrance of the portals she cries aloud:
zh: 在城門旁，在城門口， 在進城門的空地上大聲呼喊：

en: "To you, O men, I call, and my cry is to the children of man.
zh: “眾人哪！我向你們呼喚， 對世人發聲。

en: O simple ones, learn prudence; O fools, learn sense.
zh: 愚蒙人哪！你們要學習精明； 愚昧人哪！你們心裡要明白事理。

en: Hear, for I will speak noble things, and from my lips will come what is right,
zh: 你們聽著，因為我要講論極美的事， 我要開口說正直的事；

en: for my mouth will utter truth; wickedness is an abomination to my lips.
zh: 我的口要論述真理， 我的嘴唇厭惡邪惡。

en: All the words of my mouth are righteous; there is nothing twisted or crooked in them.
zh: 我口裡的一切話都是公義的， 毫無彎曲欺詐。

en: They are all straight to him who understands, and right to those who find knowledge.
zh: 我的話對明理的人，都是對的； 對得著知識的人，都是正直的。

en: Take my instruction instead of silver, and knowledge rather than choice gold,
zh: 你們要接受我的教訓，不要銀子； 寧願得著知識，勝過精金；

en: for wisdom is better than jewels, and all that you may desire cannot compare with her.
zh: 因為智慧比紅寶石更好， 你一切所喜愛的都不能和智慧比較。

en: "I, wisdom, dwell with prudence, and I find knowledge and discretion.
zh: 我─智慧─和精明同住， 我又獲得知識和謀略。

en: The fear of the LORD is hatred of evil. Pride and arrogance and the way of evil and perverted speech I hate.
zh: 敬畏耶和華就是恨惡邪惡； 驕傲、狂妄、邪惡的行為、 乖謬的口，我都恨惡。

en: I have counsel and sound wisdom; I have insight; I have strength.
zh: 我有才智和大智慧， 我有聰明，我有能力。

en: By me kings reign, and rulers decree what is just;
zh: 君王藉我掌權， 統治者藉我制定法紀。

en: by me princes rule, and nobles, all who govern justly.
zh: 領袖、貴族和所有公義的審判官， 都藉我治國。

en: I love those who love me, and those who seek me diligently find me.
zh: 愛我的，我必愛他； 殷切尋找我的，必定尋見。

en: Riches and honor are with me, enduring wealth and righteousness.
zh: 財富和尊榮是我的， 恆久的財產和公義也是我的。

en: My fruit is better than gold, even fine gold, and my yield than choice silver.
zh: 我的果實勝過黃金，勝過精金， 我的出產勝過純銀。

en: I walk in the way of righteousness, in the paths of justice,
zh: 我走在公義的道上， 行在公正的路上，

en: granting an inheritance to those who love me, and filling their treasuries.
zh: 使愛我的承受財產， 使他們的府庫滿溢。

en: "The LORD possessed me at the beginning of his work, the first of his acts of old.
zh: 在耶和華創造的開始， 在太初創造一切以先，就有了我。

en: Ages ago I was set up, at the first, before the beginning of the earth.
zh: 在亙古、在太初， 在未有大地之前，我已經被立；

en: When there were no depths I was brought forth, when there were no springs abounding with water.
zh: 沒有深淵，沒有大水的泉源以先， 我已經出生。

en: Before the mountains had been shaped, before the hills, I was brought forth,
zh: 大山未曾奠定， 小山未有以先，我已經出生。

en: before he had made the earth with its fields, or the first of the dust of the world.
zh: 那時，耶和華還沒有造大地和田野， 也沒有造地上的泥土。

en: When he established the heavens, I was there; when he drew a circle on the face of the deep,
zh: 他立定諸天的時候，我在那裡； 他在淵面上界劃地平線的時候，我在那裡；

en: when he made firm the skies above, when he established the fountains of the deep,
zh: 他上使穹蒼堅固， 下使深淵的水泉穩定；

en: when he assigned to the sea its limit, so that the waters might not transgress his command, when he marked out the foundations of the earth,
zh: 他為海洋定出界限， 海水不能越過他的命令， 他又劃定大地的根基；

en: then I was beside him, like a master workman, and I was daily his delight, rejoicing before him always,
zh: 那時，我在他身邊作工匠， 每天都充滿喜樂， 時常在他面前歡笑，

en: rejoicing in his inhabited world and delighting in the children of man.
zh: 在他的大地上歡笑， 和世人一同喜樂。

en: "And now, O sons, listen to me: blessed are those who keep my ways.
zh: 孩子們，現在你們要聽從我； 持守我道路的，是有福的。

en: Hear instruction and be wise, and do not neglect it.
zh: 你們要聽從教訓，要作智慧人， 不可離棄教訓。

en: Blessed is the one who listens to me, watching daily at my gates, waiting beside my doors.
zh: 聽從我， 天天在我門口警醒仰望， 在我門框旁邊守候的人，是有福的。

en: For whoever finds me finds life and obtains favor from the LORD,
zh: 因為找到我的，就找到生命， 他也必得著耶和華的恩惠。

en: but he who fails to find me injures himself; all who hate me love death."
zh: 得罪我的，是傷害自己； 凡是恨惡我的，就是喜愛死亡。”
